title: Page grid layouts — dot, line, and grid formats
notes: How to rule your own dot-grid, line, and square-grid pages using a light box and a printed master template beneath the sheet. Spacing options: 5 mm dot grid (the standard), 6 mm line spacing (generous for a fountain pen), 5 mm square grid. How to create a reusable master template. Scope: the physical making of the grid page; not what to write on it.
